headline: US Is Oil Supplier of Last Resort as Hormuz Disruptions Worsen
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The tankers have been arriving from all over the world in unprecedented numbers. After loading up in Alaska and along the US Gulf Coast, they head back out to sea — to Japan, Thailand and even as far as Australia.Most Read from BloombergSupertanker Appears to Have Crossed the Strait of HormuzWorld’s Largest Container Carrier Plans Route Avoiding HormuzBeijing Tells China Firms to Ignore US Sanctions on RefinersPhilippines Says Thousands Evacuated as Mayon Volcano EruptsIran Juggle
